mapper.select: SELECT * FROM evaluation_histories ORDER BY evaluated_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_histories ( grant_case_id, ai_suitability, ai_recommendation_level, ai_reason, ai_evidence, organization_snapshot, charter_snapshot, activity_snapshot, grant_snapshot, ai_raw_response, review_status, review_memo, reviewed_at, evaluated_at ) VALUES ( #{grantCaseId}, #{aiSuitability}, #{aiRecommendationLevel}, #{aiReason}, #{aiEvidence}, #{organizationSnapshot}, #{charterSnapshot}, #{activitySnapshot}, #{grantSnapshot}, #{aiRawResponse}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewMemo}, #{reviewedAt}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE evaluation_histories SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_memo = #{reviewMemo}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
